target_audience: Warehouse operators and logistics workers on the floor of Ukrainian industrial facilities using Newland MT90 handheld terminals — typically wearing gloves, working in noisy environments with intermittent connectivity
planned_features: Add Room database schema with inventory entity models
Add EditorConfig and code formatting configuration
Persistent offline/sync status bar with pending-operations counter
Create CONTRIBUTING.md with development workflow and code standards
Document project roadmap and feature specifications in version-controlled files
Configure CI pipeline with build and lint checks
Industrial-grade touch targets and spacing for glove-friendly operation
Initialize project scaffolding with standard Android/Kotlin structure
Room Database with Core Inventory Schema
Offline-First Data Persistence with Outbox Pattern
CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions & Fastlane
Scan-in-progress state indicator with visual scanner-active animation
Create a development environment setup guide
Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting system design and tech stack decisions
Create README.md with project overview, goals, and quick start
High-contrast industrial Material 3 theme with sunlight and low-light modes
Multimodal scan feedback system: sound + vibration + visual confirmation
